body_txt: A character for whom sex is an obsession, bordering on unhealthy. Perhaps they Really Get Around , thinking they'll find fulfillment , but instead they're left empty. Or perhaps they use sex to cover up deep-seated emotional issues. Or maybe they're in their mating season . Or maybe they're just simply addicted and pursue sex compulsively. Whatever the reason, this character just doesn't feel at ease if they go more than a day without screwing. The term for this particular condition is hypersexuality, which is divided into nymphomania (for women) and satyriasis (for men). Whenever it shows up it is mostly Played for Laughs . Rarely is it ever Played for Drama ; The idea that such an extreme libido could lead to a host of personal and social difficulties is itself controversial and serves as a convenient justification for why this trope is used mostly in comedy. Often overlaps with Really Gets Around , The Pornomancer and Super Sexual Stamina , when a character has screwed or been screwed by quite a few people. Other times, it can overlap with Super Sexual Stamina when they can screw for a long time. Compare Extreme Omnisexual when a character will screw if it has a pulse... or maybe even if it doesn't . Also comparable to All Men Are Perverts and All Women Are Lustful . Usually standard operating procedure for Succubi and Incubi , especially if they have a particularly large "appetite". Hormone-Addled Teenager is a subtrope for when the sex addict is overcome with hormones during puberty, and this trope tends to overlap with Trans Equals Hypersexual when the character is transgender . No Real Life Examples, Please! , both due to the theme and to the libelous potential.
